versions.version_description: Designed for beginners. Keep pinky finger down during G, Em7 and Cadd9 to smooth the sound.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                
I don't want another pretty face[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
I don't want just anyone to hold[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
I don't want my love to go to waste[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch] 
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch] 
You're the one I want to chase [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
You're the one I wanna hold[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]           
I wont let another minute go to waste     [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
 I know that you are something special[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 To you I'd be always faithful[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
 I want to be what you always needed[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
 Then I hope you'll see the heart in me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                
I don't want another pretty face[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
I don't want just anyone to hold[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
I don't want my love to go to waste[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
You're the one I want to chase [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
You're the one I wanna hold[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
I wont let another minute go to waste     [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Your beautiful soul, yeah[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            
 You might need time to think it over[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
 But im just fine moving forward[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
 I'll ease your mind If you give me the chance[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
 I will never make you cry c`mon lets try[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                
I don't want another pretty face[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]

I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
You're the one I want to chase [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
You're the one I wanna hold[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
I wont let another minute go to waste     [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Am I crazy for wanting you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
Baby do you think you could want me too[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna waste your time[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Do you see things the way I do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
I just wanna know if you feel it too[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
There is nothing left to hide[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Your beautiful soul, yeah[/tab]
